title: koyamacalia hwangshanica
intro: Koyamacalia hwangshanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Hwangshan Mountain Daisy. Native to China, this plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Koyamacalia hwangshanica include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and anticancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is said to aid in the treatment of various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
